created_by.description: The operator who issued this team-scoped key.

secret.description: Returned only by this creation response.

expires_in_hours.description:
Invitation lifetime in hours. Defaults to seven days and is capped at
thirty days.

token.description: Returned only by the invitation-creation response.

kind.description:
Native `open_ai` and `anthropic` use their official endpoints.
Compatible variants require an explicit HTTPS endpoint and live
certification of reviewed capabilities.

model.description:
Optional seed/probe model. Vertex AI requires one because its publisher
model collection has no list operation; other connectors can discover
models after the draft is created.

active.description: True when this credential is used by the immutable runtime revision.

draft_selected.description: True when this credential is selected only by the mutable draft.

models.description:
Omit or pass an empty array to query the upstream model-list API.
Manual identifiers are a fallback for upstreams without a list API.
All discovered models start disabled and without capability claims until
the explicit review operation is completed.

issuer.description:
Issuer identifier configured out-of-band with the identity provider.
Discovery must return this exact value.

capabilities.description:
Capability tuples with a safe server-owned certification path for this
provider kind. Catalog validation may support additional future tuples.

historical_credential_version.description: Historical metadata only. Restore never selects this credential.

credential_restored.description: Always false: historical credential material is never restored.

historical_credential_version.description: Historical metadata only. Restore never selects this credential.

capabilities.description:
Explicit operator-reviewed capability tuples. Their provenance is
recorded as `declared`; certification/probe jobs may promote provenance
separately and cannot be forged by the browser.

ingestion_gap_events.description: Exact loss plus known in-flight lower bounds from unclean epochs.

uncertain_gap_count.description:
Unclean gateway epochs make completeness unknown even when their last
durable in-flight lower bound was zero.

bootstrapSetupToken.description: One-time bootstrap token required only while creating the first installation owner.
bootstrapSetupToken.name: X-OLP-Setup-Token

csrfToken.description: Double-submit CSRF token required with authenticated mutations.
csrfToken.name: x-csrf-token
